use_cases: Security teams monitoring suspicious activity across time windows
DevOps tracking anomaly intensity patterns in system logs
Fintech dashboards visualizing fraud detection signals
Analytics platforms displaying intensity-based data across grid layouts
Operations centers monitoring system health with visual heatmaps
ai_summary: AnomalyHeatmap is a data visualization card component that renders a configurable grid of cells with intensity-based color gradients. Each cell scales and glows on hover with staggered animation delays, creating a dynamic monitoring dashboard element. Supports dark/light themes and displays anomaly intensity using cyan color scaling from 15% to 85% opacity.
